subcodes.first_line: Great is the bounty of the True One, glorified be His majesty, and all-encompassing is His grace on this day, the lord of days, before the Lord of all mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بزرگست عنایت حق جل جلاله و محیطست فضلش امروز از سید ایام نزد مولی الانام
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
